business.title: Ransomware Attack on Vivaticket Disrupts Louvre and Major European Museums
business.description: What happened A ransomware attack on Vivaticket disrupted online reservations at major European museums and monuments after the ticketing provider was hit in early March. The incident reportedly took place on March 2 and affected about 3,500 European museums and monuments.
